fieldUpdates.formula: IF( CONTAINS( $Profile.Name , 'API') , Closure_Reason__c , IF(ISPICKVAL(Maintenance_Status__c, 'STATE_CLOSED'),'Cancelled',''))
fieldUpdates.name: ALD SAT MEX/HUN Maintenance Status
FRA - Assign Case to AIXM PSC queue
FRA - Assign Case to BORDEAUX PSC queue
FRA - Assign Case to LYON PSC queue
FRA -Assign Case to STRASBOURG PSC queue
FRA - Assign Case to Service Carburant
FRA - Assign Case to TOULOUSE PSC queue
BEL - Reset Inform Contact On Case Close
Change the status to "Waiting for approv

fieldUpdates.formula: CASE( External_Case_Category__c , "Administrative", "ADMINISTRATIF", "ASSISTANCE", "ASSISTANCE", "Billing", "FACTURATION", "Fuel", "CARBURANT", "Insurance", "ASSURANCE", "Fuel", "CARBURANT", "Maintenance/Tyres","ENTRETIEN/PNEU", "Order and deliveries","COMMANDES/LIVRAISONS", "Partners","PARTENAIRES", "Prodigo","PRODIGO", "Quotes","DEVIS", "Return","RESTITUTION", "Sales followup","SUIVI COMMERCIAL", "Taxes","FISCALITE","") &" - "& TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))&"/"&TEXT(MONTH(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))&"/"&TEXT(YEAR(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))
fieldUpdates.name: FRA - Case Update Subject

fieldUpdates.formula: $UserRole.Name
fieldUpdates.name: FRA - Update Case Creator Role

fieldUpdates.formula: CASE (External_Case_Category__c, "COMMANDES", CASE (External_Case_Type__c, "INFORMATION SUR COMMANDE", "COMMANDES - INFORMATION SUR COMMANDE", "DEMANDE DE DELAI", "COMMANDES - DEMANDE DE DELAI", "MODIFICATION", "COMMANDES - MODIFICATION", "GESTION DES CP","COMMANDES - GESTION DES CP", "ANNULATION","COMMANDES - ANNULATION", "AUTRE","COMMANDES - AUTRE", "COMMANDES"), "LIVRAISONS", CASE (External_Case_Type__c, "DEMANDE D’INFORMATION","LIVRAISONS - DEMANDE D’INFORMATION", "LIVRAISONS EN WW","LIVRAISONS - LIVRAISONS EN WW", "MECONTENTEMENT","LIVRAISONS - MECONTENTEMENT", "AUTRE","LIVRAISONS - AUTRE", "LIVRAISONS"), "COTATIONS", CASE (External_Case_Type__c, "AO CLIENT","COTATIONS - AO CLIENT", "REPONSE A AO","COTATIONS - REPONSE A AO", "NOUVELLE DEMANDE","COTATIONS - NOUVELLE DEMANDE", "MODIF DEVIS EXISTANT","COTATIONS - MODIF DEVIS EXISTANT", "CATALOGUE OU GRILLE","COTATIONS - CATALOGUE OU GRILLE", "LEASE BACK","COTATIONS - LEASE BACK", "EXPLICATION SUR DEVIS","COTATIONS - EXPLICATION SUR DEVIS", "AUTRE","COTATIONS - AUTRE", "COTATIONS"), "") &" - "& TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))&"/"&TEXT(MONTH(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))&"/"&TEXT(YEAR(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))
fieldUpdates.name: FRA - Update Case Subject 1st

fieldUpdates.formula: CASE (External_Case_Category__c, "ASSISTANCE", CASE (External_Case_Type__c, "INTERVENTIONS PRISES EN CHARGE","ASSISTANCE - INTERVENTIONS PRISES EN CHARGE", "INTERVENTIONS DÉJÀ EFFECTUEES","ASSISTANCE - INTERVENTIONS DÉJÀ EFFECTUEES", "AIDE AU CHOIX LIEU INTERVENTION", "ASSISTANCE - AIDE AU CHOIX LIEU INTERVENTION", "RECLAMATION","ASSISTANCE - RECLAMATION", "LITIGE/VEH NON FIABLE/PANNE RECURENTE","ASSISTANCE - LITIGE/VEH NON FIABLE/PANNE RECURENTE", "ENVOI FICHE DE GARANTIE","ASSISTANCE - ENVOI FICHE DE GARANTIE", "ASSISTANCE"), "PNEUMATIQUES", CASE (External_Case_Type__c, "INFORMATIONS SUR RESEAU PARTENAIRES","PNEUMATIQUES - INFORMATIONS SUR RESEAU PARTENAIRES", "INFORMATIONS SUR PNEUS RESTANTS POUR 1 VEH","PNEUMATIQUES - INFORMATIONS SUR PNEUS RESTANTS POUR 1 VEH", "INFORMATIONS SUR PNEUS RESTANTS POUR 1 PARC","PNEUMATIQUES - INFORMATIONS SUR PNEUS RESTANTS POUR 1 PARC", "AJOUT EN URGENCE","PNEUMATIQUES - AJOUT EN URGENCE", "GESTION DE LA PRESTATION (AJOUT, RETRAIT, MODIF)","PNEUMATIQUES - GESTION DE LA PRESTATION (AJOUT, RETRAIT, MODIF)", "ETUDE ANALYSE","PNEUMATIQUES - ETUDE ANALYSE", "PNEUMATIQUES"), "") &" - "& TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))&"/"&TEXT(MONTH(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))&"/"&TEXT(YEAR(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))
fieldUpdates.name: FRA - Update Case Subject - 2nd

fieldUpdates.formula: CASE (External_Case_Category__c, "VEHICULE DE REMPLACEMENT", CASE (External_Case_Type__c, "INFOS GENERALES","VEHICULE DE REMPLACEMENT - INFOS GENERALES", "DEMANDE DE TARIFS LCD","VEHICULE DE REMPLACEMENT - DEMANDE DE TARIFS LCD", "AJOUT / RETRAIT PRESTA","VEHICULE DE REMPLACEMENT - AJOUT / RETRAIT PRESTA", "ETUDE ANALYSE","VEHICULE DE REMPLACEMENT - ETUDE ANALYSE", "RESERVATION LCD / MOYENNE DUREE","VEHICULE DE REMPLACEMENT - RESERVATION LCD / MOYENNE DUREE", "MECONTENTEMENT VEHICULE","VEHICULE DE REMPLACEMENT - MECONTENTEMENT VEHICULE", "VEHICULE DE REMPLACEMENT"), "PRESTATIONS ADDITIONNELLES", CASE (External_Case_Type__c, "ALDNET","PRESTATIONS ADDITIONNELLES - ALDNET", "ALDCAR","PRESTATIONS ADDITIONNELLES - ALDCAR", "BELTOISE PREVENTION","PRESTATIONS ADDITIONNELLES - BELTOISE PREVENTION", "ENQUETES","PRESTATIONS ADDITIONNELLES - ENQUETES", "PRODIGO","PRESTATIONS ADDITIONNELLES - PRODIGO", "SERVICE PLUS","PRESTATIONS ADDITIONNELLES - SERVICE PLUS", "TELEPEAGE","PRESTATIONS ADDITIONNELLES - TELEPEAGE", "VIP","PRESTATIONS ADDITIONNELLES - VIP", "PRESTATIONS ADDITIONNELLES"), "") &" - "& TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))&"/"&TEXT(MONTH(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))&"/"&TEXT(YEAR(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))
fieldUpdates.name: FRA - Update Case Subject 3rd

fieldUpdates.formula:
CASE (External_Case_Category__c, "ASSURANCE", CASE (External_Case_Type__c, "ETUDE","ASSURANCE - ETUDE", "INFOS SINISTRE","ASSURANCE - INFOS SINISTRE", "STATS","ASSURANCE - STATS", "AJOUT / RETRAIT PRESTA","ASSURANCE - AJOUT / RETRAIT PRESTA", "RELEVE D'INFORMATIONS","ASSURANCE - RELEVE D'INFORMATIONS", "CARTE VERTE","ASSURANCE - CARTE VERTE", "ASSURANCE"),
"CARBURANT", CASE (External_Case_Type__c, "OPPO DUPLI","CARBURANT - OPPO DUPLI", "FIN DE LOC SGP","CARBURANT - FIN DE LOC SGP", "REEDITION CODE","CARBURANT - REEDITION CODE", "RECLAMATION","CARBURANT - RECLAMATION", "GESTION DE LA PRESTATION (AJOUT, RETRAIT, MODIF)","CARBURANT - GESTION DE LA PRESTATION (AJOUT, RETRAIT, MODIF)", "PARAMETRAGE CARTE ACTYS","CARBURANT - PARAMETRAGE CARTE ACTYS", "ANALYSE DE CONSOMMATION POUR 1 CARTE","CARBURANT - ANALYSE DE CONSOMMATION POUR 1 CARTE", "ANALYSE DE CONSOMMATION POUR 1 PARC","CARBURANT - ANALYSE DE CONSOMMATION POUR 1 PARC", "CARBURANT"), "ANALYSE DU PARC", CASE (External_Case_Type__c, "ETAT DE PARC","ANALYSE DU PARC - ETAT DE PARC", "RENOUVELLEMENT","ANALYSE DU PARC - RENOUVELLEMENT", "ANALYSE DU PARC"), "") &" - "& TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))&"/"&TEXT(MONTH(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))&"/"&TEXT(YEAR(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))
fieldUpdates.name: FRA - Update Case Subject - 4th

fieldUpdates.formula: CASE (External_Case_Category__c, "MODIFICATIONS DE CONTRATS", CASE (External_Case_Type__c, "CONDUCTEURS","MODIFICATIONS DE CONTRATS - CONDUCTEURS", "STRUCTURES","MODIFICATIONS DE CONTRATS - STRUCTURES", "REFERENCES CLIENTS", "MODIFICATIONS DE CONTRATS - REFERENCES CLIENTS", "DUREE KM","MODIFICATIONS DE CONTRATS - DUREE KM", "TRANSFERT","MODIFICATIONS DE CONTRATS - TRANSFERT", "MODIFICATIONS DE CONTRATS"), "MODIFICATIONS DE CLIENTS", CASE (External_Case_Type__c, "COORDONNEES", "MODIFICATIONS DE CLIENTS - COORDONNEES", "RIB - COORD.BANCAIRES", "MODIFICATIONS DE CLIENTS - RIB - COORD.BANCAIRES", "MODIFICATIONS DE CLIENTS"), "AMENDES", CASE (External_Case_Type__c, "EXPLICATION FRAIS","AMENDES - EXPLICATION FRAIS", "MECONTENTEMENT/EXONERATION","AMENDES - MECONTENTEMENT/EXONERATION", "AMENDES"), "SUIVI COMMERCIAL", CASE (External_Case_Type__c, "DEMANDE DE RDV","SUIVI COMMERCIAL - DEMANDE DE RDV", "MECONTENTEMENT COMMERCIAL","SUIVI COMMERCIAL - MECONTENTEMENT COMMERCIAL", "AUTRE","SUIVI COMMERCIAL - AUTRE", "SUIVI COMMERCIAL"), "SUITE OPERATION MKT","SUITE OPERATION MKT", "") &" - "& TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))&"/"&TEXT(MONTH(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))&"/"&TEXT(YEAR(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))
fieldUpdates.name: FRA - Update Case Subject - 5th

fieldUpdates.formula: CASE (External_Case_Category__c, "FACTURATION", CASE (External_Case_Type__c, "LOYERS","FACTURATION - LOYERS", "CARBURANT","FACTURATION - CARBURANT", "REFACTURATION","FACTURATION - REFACTURATION", "DEPRECIATION COMPLEMENTAIRE","FACTURATION - DEPRECIATION COMPLEMENTAIRE", "FIN DE LOCATION","FACTURATION - FIN DE LOCATION", "FICHIERS ELECTRONIQUES","FACTURATION - FICHIERS ELECTRONIQUES", "PARAMETRAGE","FACTURATION - PARAMETRAGE", "ATTENTE D'UN AVOIR OU GESTE COMMERCIAL","FACTURATION - ATTENTE D'UN AVOIR OU GESTE COMMERCIAL", "FACTURATION - AUTRE"), "ETATS FISCAUX", CASE (External_Case_Type__c,"TAXE PRO","ETATS FISCAUX - TAXE PRO", "TVS","ETATS FISCAUX - TVS", "AND","ETATS FISCAUX - AND", "AVANTAGES EN NATURE","ETATS FISCAUX - AVANTAGES EN NATURE", "AUTRE","ETATS FISCAUX - AUTRE", "ETATS FISCAUX"), "FIN DE CONTRATS", CASE (External_Case_Type__c, "LIEU DE RESTIT","FIN DE CONTRATS - LIEU DE RESTIT", "SIMULATION FIN DE LOC","FIN DE CONTRAT - SIMULATION FIN DE LOC", "RACHAT UTILISATEUR","FIN DE CONTRATS - RACHAT UTILISATEUR", "AUTRE","FIN DE CONTRATS - AUTRE", "FIN DE CONTRATS"),"") &" - "& TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))&"/"&TEXT(MONTH(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))&"/"&TEXT(YEAR(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))
fieldUpdates.name: FRA - Update Case Subject - 6th

fieldUpdates.formula: CASE (External_Case_Category__c, "DOCUMENTATION COMMERCIALE", CASE (External_Case_Type__c, "PRESENTATION ALD","DOCUMENTATION COMMERCIALE - PRESENTATION ALD", "FICHES PRODUITS/TECHNIQUES","DOCUMENTATION COMMERCIALE - FICHES PRODUITS/TECHNIQUES", "LES POINTS SUR","DOCUMENTATION COMMERCIALE - LES POINTS SUR", "GUIDES TVS","DOCUMENTATION COMMERCIALE - GUIDES TVS", "NEWSLETTER","DOCUMENTATION COMMERCIALE - NEWSLETTER", "AUTRE", "DOCUMENTATION COMMERCIALE - AUTRE", "DOCUMENTATION COMMERCIALE"), "DEMANDES ADMINISTRATIVES", CASE (External_Case_Type__c, "TRANSPORT","DEMANDES ADMINISTRATIVES - TRANSPORT", "SORTIE DE TERRITOIRE","DEMANDES ADMINISTRATIVES - SORTIE DE TERRITOIRE", "PARKING RESIDENTIEL","DEMANDES ADMINISTRATIVES - PARKING RESIDENTIEL", "MISE EN FOURRIERE/GARDE JURIDIQUE","DEMANDES ADMINISTRATIVES - MISE EN FOURRIERE/GARDE JURIDIQUE", "AUTRE","DEMANDES ADMINISTRATIVES - AUTRE", "CARTE GRISE","DEMANDES ADMINISTRATIVES - CARTE GRISE", "DEMANDES ADMINISTRATIVES"), "") &" - "& TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))&"/"&TEXT(MONTH(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))&"/"&TEXT(YEAR(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)))
fieldUpdates.name: FRA - Update Case Subject - 7th

fieldUpdates.description: Cases from the web assigned to FRA - ALD Electric
fieldUpdates.name: FRA Assign ALD Electric
FRA Assign Case to AIX PSC queu

fieldUpdates.description: Assignation des cases à l'agence IDF Est suite à réorganisation géographique
fieldUpdates.name: FRA - Assign Case to IDF Est Pole PSC

fieldUpdates.description: Assignation à la queue FRA _ IDF Ouest région C Pôle PSC suite à la réorganisation géographique
fieldUpdates.name: FRA - Assign Case to IDF Ouest Rég. C
FRA - Assign Case to ald direct queue
FRA Assign Service Conducteur Gest Sinis

fieldUpdates.description: re-assign all the cases to the queue FRA - PART TECH – Relations Clients if the sender contains "@credit-cgi.fr", "@toyota-fs.com", "@ford.com"
fieldUpdates.name: FRA - PART TECH – Relations Clients
FRA – Web2Case OBS Toyota Owner Update

fieldUpdates.formula: TRIM(Sender__c )
fieldUpdates.name: Field Update Email Sender

fieldUpdates.formula: 24 *(( Service_Request_Date__c - CreatedDate) + Number_of_days__c)
fieldUpdates.name: HRV - Update Treatment Time Objective

fieldUpdates.description: on Case field "Reopen Count" to increase it
fieldUpdates.formula: Reopen_Count__c + 1
fieldUpdates.name: Reopen Count

fieldUpdates.formula: Subject
fieldUpdates.name: Populate case subject

fieldUpdates.formula: Financial_correction_Requested_amount__c
fieldUpdates.name: Set Financial correction Approved amount

fieldUpdates.formula: $User.Email
fieldUpdates.name: Set Submitter Email

fieldUpdates.formula: $User.Email
fieldUpdates.name: Set submitter email to current user​
Uncheck Inform Contact On Case Closed

fieldUpdates.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c, "Other"), 72, CASE(External_Case_Category__c , "Order and deliveries", 24, "Quotes", CASE(External_Case_Type__c , "New request", 24, "Modification", 24, "Information", IF( ISPICKVAL(Account.Status__c, "Customer"),0, 24), 168 ), "Maintenance/Tyres", IF( ISPICKVAL( External_Case_Type__c, "Claim"), 24, IF( OR(ISPICKVAL( External_Case_Type__c, "Information") , ISPICKVAL( External_Case_Type__c, "Modification")), 96, 0 ) ), "Assistance", 0, "GDPR", 0, 72 ) )
fieldUpdates.name: Update Treatment Time Time Objective 1

fieldUpdates.formula: CASE(External_Case_Category__c, "Insurance", CASE(External_Case_Detail__c, "New Study", 120, "Sinister follow-up", 72, "Study follow-up", 72, "Green Card", 48, 360 ), "Fuel", CASE(External_Case_Detail__c, "Duplicate", 0, "COMPTE PETROLIER", 0, "Reset Code", 120, "PARAMETRAGE COMPTE / CARTE / D174", 96, "Consumption", 120, 48 ), 96 )
fieldUpdates.name: Update Treatment Time Time Objective 2

fieldUpdates.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c, "Other"), 72, CASE(External_Case_Category__c , "Billing", CASE(External_Case_Detail__c, "Fee explanation", 0, "paramétrage facture", 24, 48), "Taxes", IF(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Type__c, "Information"), 0, 4 ), "Sales followup", 24, "Administrative", CASE(External_Case_Detail__c, "Country exit", 24, "Car license", 360, "Fee explanation", 0, 72), 72) )
fieldUpdates.name: Update Treatment Time Time Objective 3

fieldUpdates.formula: IF(ROUND(Treatment_Time_Objective__c/24,0)+ MOD( DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) - DATE (1900, 1, 7), 7)>=6,2,0)
fieldUpdates.name: Update WE day bonus

fieldUpdates.description: When the approval request is approved, then the requested amount is also copied in the approved amount
fieldUpdates.formula: Financial_correction_Requested_amount__c
fieldUpdates.name: Update Approved Amount

fieldUpdates.formula: TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Status))
fieldUpdates.name: Update old picklist

fieldUpdates.formula: (FLOOR (FLOOR (Treatment_Time_Objective__c / 24) / 5 ) * 7) + CASE (MOD (DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) - DATE (1900, 1, 7), 7), 0, CASE (MOD (FLOOR(Treatment_Time_Objective__c / 24), 5), 0,1, 1,2, 2,3, 3,4, 4,5, 0), 1, CASE (MOD (FLOOR(Treatment_Time_Objective__c / 24), 5), 0,0, 1,1, 2,2, 3,3, 4,4, 0), 2, CASE (MOD (FLOOR (Treatment_Time_Objective__c / 24), 5), 0,0, 1,1, 2,2, 3,3, 4,6, 0), 3, CASE (MOD (FLOOR (Treatment_Time_Objective__c / 24), 5), 0,0, 1,1, 2,2, 3,5, 4,6, 0), 4, CASE (MOD (FLOOR (Treatment_Time_Objective__c / 24), 5), 0,0, 1,1, 2,4, 3,5, 4,6, 0), 5, CASE (MOD (FLOOR (Treatment_Time_Objective__c / 24), 5), 0,0, 1,3, 2,4, 3,5, 4,6, 0), 6, CASE (MOD (FLOOR (Treatment_Time_Objective__c / 24), 5), 0,2, 1,3, 2,4, 3,5, 4,6, 0), 0 )
fieldUpdates.name: Weekend days update

rules.fullName: ALD SAT MEX
ALD SAT MEX%2FHUN
ALD SAT MEX%2FHUN Case Status

rules.booleanFilter: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND 8
rules.description: CRMv2

rules.fullName: FRA - CDN - Case Open%3A send email %28autre%29
rules.booleanFilter: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND 8
rules.description: CRMv2

rules.fullName: FRA - CDN -Case Open%3A send email %28email%29

rules.booleanFilter: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND 8 AND 9
rules.description: CRMv2

rules.description: CRMv2

rules.booleanFilter: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6
rules.description: CRMv2

rules.fullName: FRA - Case Update Category and Type GDPR
rules.description: Put the value GDPR and New Request default on MailToCase GDPR

rules.fullName: FRA - Case received%3A send response notification to customer
rules.booleanFilter: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6

criteriaItems.value: Suite à votre notation de notre partenaire

rules.description: Customer Notification: Once the mail sent by the customer in response to myALD rating questionnaire, a confirmation e-mail informing him that his request has been considered.

rules.fullName: FRA - DAE
rules.booleanFilter: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5

rules.fullName: FRA - New owner notification
rules.formula: AND(!$User.Bypass_Workflow__c, RecordType.Name = 'Case External France', ISCHANGED(OwnerId), LEFT(OwnerId, 3) <> "00G")

rules.fullName: FRA - OBS and Toyata Net Web2Case
rules.booleanFilter: 1 AND 2 AND 3

rules.fullName: FRA - Update Case Creator Role
rules.description: CRMv2 - Needed for reporting purposes

rules.fullName: FRA - Update Case Owner
rules.booleanFilter: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4

rules.fullName: FRA - Update Case Subject
rules.booleanFilter: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4
rules.description: Subject = "Category & Date" (Ticket #19476 ) Should replace all other rules... JGV: 5/5/2008

rules.fullName: FRA - Update Case Time Objective %26 WE days - 1st
rules.description: CRMv2 - Set the Treatment time objective depending on Category and Type of Case and account status + Set week-end day bonus Category : ASSISTANCE, COMMANDES, LIVRAISONS, COTATIONS, MAINTENANCE PNEUMATIQUES, VEHICULE DE REMPLACEMENT
rules.formula: AND( RecordTypeId = "0122000000005ov", OR( ISCHANGED( External_Case_Category__c) , ISCHANGED( External_Case_Type__c), ISCHANGED( External_Case_Detail__c), ISNEW() ), OR( ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c, "Assistance"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c, "Order and deliveries"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c, "Quotes"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c, "Maintenance/Tyres"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c, "GDPR") ), NOT( $User.Bypass_Workflow__c ) )

rules.fullName: FRA - Update Case Time Objective %26 WE days - 2nd
rules.description: CRMv2 - Set the Treatment time objective depending on Category, Type & account status + Set week-end day bonus Category : PRESTATIONS ADDITIONNELLES, ASSURANCE, CARBURANT, ANALYSE DU PARC, MODIFICATIONS DE CONTRATS, MODIFICATIONS DE CLIENTS, AMENDES
rules.formula: AND( RecordTypeId = "0122000000005ov", OR( ISCHANGED( External_Case_Category__c) , ISCHANGED( External_Case_Type__c), ISCHANGED( External_Case_Detail__c), ISNEW() ), OR( ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c, "Insurance"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c, "Fuel"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c, "Alert fraud"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c, "ELECTRONIC TOLL"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c, "Partners") ), NOT( $User.Bypass_Workflow__c ) )

rules.fullName: FRA - Update Case Time Objective %26 WE days - 3rd
rules.description: CRMv2 - Set the Treatment time objective depending on Category, Type & account status + Set week-end day bonus Cat : FACTURATION, ETATS FISCAUX, FIN DE CONTRATS, DOCUMENTATION COMMERCIALE, SUIVI COMMERCIAL, SUITE OPERATION MKT, DEMANDES ADMINISTRATIVES
rules.formula: AND( RecordTypeId = "0122000000005ov", OR( ISCHANGED( External_Case_Category__c) , ISCHANGED( External_Case_Type__c), ISCHANGED( External_Case_Detail__c), ISNEW() ), OR( ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c, "Billing"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c, "Taxes"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c, "Return"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c, "Sales followup"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c, "Administrative") ), NOT( $User.Bypass_Workflow__c ) )

rules.fullName: FRA_Webcase_Electric
rules.booleanFilter: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5
rules.description: Cases from the web assigned to

rules.fullName: HRV - Relief

criteriaItems.value: Other,Request related to the rented vehicle,Damage on a relief vehicle,Request related to the relief supplier

rules.fullName: HRV - Treatment Time Relief
rules.booleanFilter: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6

rules.fullName: HUN - Email2Case AutoReply
IND - inform contact on case open EN
IND inform contact on Case closed EN
rules.booleanFilter: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5

rules.fullName: ITA - Case Close%3A send email
rules.description: CRM V2, This workflow will send an email alert when a case is closed and also set the Field Inform Contact On Case Closed to False

rules.fullName: ITA - Strategic Account
ITA - send mail on case opening
ITA notify when case created mail2case
rules.booleanFilter: 4 AND 3 AND 2 AND 1 AND 5
rules.description: Notify the related contact when the case is created from an Italian mail2case.

rules.fullName: LAT - WF - Inform Contact On Case Closed
LAT - WF - Inform Contact On Case Open
MEX - Email2Case_AutoReply
MEX - Send Notification to Email Sender on Email2Case creation
MOR - Email2Case_AutoReply for Aldcontact
MOR - Email2Case_AutoReply for Kia
MOR - Email2Case_AutoReply for Servicereclamation
MOR - Inform Contact on Case opened - FRENCH
rules.booleanFilter: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7
rules.description: <-French Email for Morocco->

rules.fullName: MOR - Track how many times cases are reopened
rules.description: Identifies if the previous status was "Closed"
rules.formula: AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), ISCHANGED(Status), OR(TEXT(Status) = 'Open', TEXT(Status) = 'Reopened'), OR(TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Status)) = 'Closed', TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Status)) = 'Closed without action plan', TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Status)) = 'Closed with action plan') )

rules.fullName: Populate Case Subject
rules.booleanFilter: 1 AND 2 AND 3

rules.fullName: ROM - Inform Contact on Case Open
ROM - Request Car Fleet Manager Approval
rules.description: #171306 This checkbox should work with a similar workflow as "Inform Car Fleet Manager On Case Opened" and should send an specific email to the contact person listed as Fleet manager in the Contact Roles.

rules.fullName: ROM - Update Treatment Time upon Number of Items %3C%3D20 items
rules.booleanFilter: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6
rules.description: If "Number of items" <= 20, Then Treatment Time is 7 days

rules.fullName: SWE ALD - Inform Contact On Case Closed
rules.formula: AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), ContactId <> null, Contact.Email <> null , RecordType.Name ='Case External Sweden', IsClosed =True, Inform_Contact_On_Case_Closed__c =True, Subsidiary_Indicator__c= '75201')

rules.fullName: SWE NF - Inform Contact On Case Closed
rules.formula: AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c),ContactId <> null, Contact.Email <> null , RecordType.Name ='Case External Sweden', IsClosed =True, Inform_Contact_On_Case_Closed__c =True, Subsidiary_Indicator__c= '75202')

rules.fullName: TUR - Queue alert %28On Case Open%29
TUR - Send Notification to Email Sender on Email2Case creation
Track how many times cases are reopened
rules.description: Identifies if the previous status was "Closed"
rules.formula: AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), ISCHANGED(Status), OR(TEXT(Status) = 'Open', TEXT(Status) = 'Reopened'), OR(TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Status)) = 'Closed', TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Status)) = 'Closed without action plan', TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Status)) = 'Closed with action plan') )

rules.fullName: UKR - Notify Case Owners
Update OLD STATUS Value
